headline: BD Rolls Out Next-Gen Medication Dispensing System Across Europe
summary: BDX rolls out AI-powered Pyxis Pro and Incada platforms in Europe, aiming to boost hospital efficiency, improve medication access and elevate patient care.

raw.headline: BD Rolls Out Next-Gen Medication Dispensing System Across Europe

headline: 1 Value Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

raw.headline: 1 Value Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Turn Down

headline: ANGO Stock Up in Pre-Market Post Q3 Earnings Beat, Gross Margin Down
summary: AngioDynamics tops estimates as revenue rises and losses narrow, driven by Med Tech demand, even as gross margin slips.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on GE HealthCare Techs, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains GE HealthCare Techs (NASDAQ:GEHC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $98 to $85.

headline: GE HealthCare to announce first quarter 2026 results on April 29, 2026
summary: CHICAGO, April 06, 2026--GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) will announce its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Wednesday, April 29, 2026. The GE HealthCare management team will also host a conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time / 7:30 a.m. Central Time on that same day, which will be a live webcast and accessible at https://investor.gehealthcare.com/news-events/events.
